allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Phase 1 cleanup - consolidate JDTLS, configure Neorg, standardize names

JDTLS Consolidation:
- Consolidate 11+ duplicate JDTLS configs into single jdtls.lua
- Archive jdtls-auto-import, jdtls-final-solution, jdtls-backup/ directory
- Archive .bak files: jdtls.lua.bak, jdtls-simple.lua.bak, jdtls-ultra-minimal.lua.bak
- Remove obsolete scripts: java_env.sh, jdtls_diagnostico.sh

Neorg Configuration:
- Configure Neorg with proper setup and workspaces \(~/notes, ~/work-notes\)
- Remove neorg-disable.lua
- Enable core modules: defaults, concealer, dirman, completion, keybinds

Code Cleanup:
- Archive 7 completely commented plugin files \(catpuccin, claudecode, codecompanion, colorschemes, coolchunk, elixir-tools\)
- Clean copilot.lua: remove commented configuration blocks

Standardization:
- Fix typos: loghighligth → loghighlight, tiny-diagnostigs → tiny-diagnostics
- Rename for clarity: manyplugins → core-plugins, elixir-enhanced → elixir
- Rename jdtls-unified → jdtls \(standard name\)

All removed files archived to archive/ directory for recovery if needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
